nasb.text: Of Benjamin he said, “May the beloved of the Lord dwell in security by Him, Who shields him all the day, And he dwells between His shoulders.”

esv.text: Of Benjamin he said, “The beloved of the Lord dwells in safety. The High God surrounds him all day long, and dwells between his shoulders.”

cnv.text: 論到便雅憫，他說： “耶和華所愛的，必在耶和華身邊安然居住； 耶和華終日庇護他， 也必住在他的兩肩之間。”

ccb.text: 摩西祝福便雅悯支派说： “耶和华所爱的人， 安居在祂身边， 安居在祂怀中， 终日蒙祂庇护。”
